data.title: Argosy Private Equity exits investment in Groome Industrial Service Group after acquiring it in 2017. Founded in 1969, Groome is headquartered in Denville, NJ.
data.description: In Wayne, Pennsylvania on September 18, 2025, Argosy Private Equity disclosed the exit of its investment in Groome Industrial Service Group. Established in 1969 and located in Denville, NJ, Groome was the focus of the lower middle market private equity firm.

data.title: Insta360 wins Emmy® Award for 360 camera tech and software. Honored by NATAS for innovations. Emphasizing seamless software.
data.description: In Los Angeles on September 18, 2025, Insta360 proudly announced its reception of a prestigious Technology & Engineering Emmy® Award from the National Academy of Television Arts & Sciences (NATAS). This groundbreaking award marks a significant milestone for Insta360 as they are recognized for their pioneering work in 360-degree camera technology.

data.title: Xulon Press presents a biblical study on infertility by Katie Johnson showing a path to God's goodness amid frustrations.
data.description: Xulon Press introduces an insightful biblical examination of infertility by a woman who grappled with deep frustration. Released in THEODORE, Ala. on September 18, 2025, author Katie Johnson delves into navigating God's benevolence amidst perplexing situations in her book Waiting Expectantly.

data.title: New MCP Registry from GitHub improves AI server discovery with a centralized hub, boosting integration and interoperability. #GitHub #MCP
data.description: GitHub has recently launched the MCP Registry, a central hub designed for easier exploration of MCP servers. This new feature aims to improve AI tool integration and increase interoperability among various platforms. The MCP Registry serves as a one-stop platform for users to discover MCP servers more efficiently. This move is expected to streamline the process and foster collaboration within the AI community, ultimately benefiting users across different platforms.

data.title: XRP's all-time high odds increase, Bitcoin dominance dips on Myriad; top markets: XRP price, OpenSea token launch.
data.description: This week on Myriad, the top markets are abuzz with discussions about the next milestone price for XRP, Bitcoin dominance, and the upcoming token launch on OpenSea. Traders are closely monitoring XRP's price movements in anticipation of reaching a significant milestone. Additionally, there is a surge in interest surrounding Bitcoin dominance, reflecting the market's sentiment towards the leading cryptocurrency. OpenSea's pending token launch has also created excitement, with many keeping a close eye on this development.Overall, the Myriad platform is experiencing high activity as traders engage with these key market trends.

data.title: Inmar Intelligence secures agreements with Premier, Inc. for pharmacy claims reconciliation and DSCSA compliance.
data.description: A company based in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, Inmar Intelligence, announced on September 18, 2025, that it has secured major national group purchasing deals with Premier, Inc. for two key services. The agreements pertain to pharmacy claims reconciliation services and DSCSA compliance solutions. Inmar Intelligence is recognized for its expertise in healthcare technology and compliance solutions. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to establish itself as a leader in the industry. The agreements with Premier, Inc. are expected to have a major impact on Inmar Intelligence's operations, potentially leading to increased market share and revenue growth.

data.title: Dow rises 200 points on jobless claims news; Nvidia gains on Intel stake. Market coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average surged alongside other stock indexes following an unexpected drop in weekly jobless claims. Nvidia's stock saw a significant increase due to its stake in Intel. Today, the Dow rose by 200 points. Additionally, companies like Cadence, Spotify, and TTM Technologies are eyeing potential buy points in the market as per live coverage updates.

data.title: Zoute Concours Auction to feature coveted supercars like Bugatti EB110 GT, Ferrari F40, Porsche 959 Komfort, and more. Event on 10th October 2025 in collaboration with Zoute Grand Prix Car Week. Aleggria Collection showcases seven highly desirable supercars. Daniel Ricciardo's Aston Martin Valkyrie, one-off Transformers Bugatti Veyron 16.4 Grand Sport Vitesse, and Lamborghini Pregunta Concept also in spotlight.
data.description: Full details on the Zoute Concours auction are now accessible, showcasing a collection of seven top-tier supercars such as the Bugatti EB110 GT, Ferrari F40, and Porsche 959 Komfort from the esteemed Alegria collection. Notable highlights include the Verde Pino Ferrari 275 GTB/4, Daniel Ricciardo’s Aston Martin Valkyrie, a unique Transformers Bugatti Veyron 16.4 Grand Sport Vitesse, and the Lamborghini Pregunta Concept. The auction, in association with Zoute Grand Prix Car Week, is scheduled for October 10, 2025.
ABO-Group Environment reports its half-year results for 2025, showing a revenue increase of 15% compared to last year.

data.title: Immix Biopharma hits 50% enrollment milestone in NEXICART-2 AL Amyloidosis trial, aiming for first BLA-approved cell therapy.
data.description: Progress is being made towards the approval of the first FDA Biologics License Application for a cell therapy in the orphan indication of relapsed/refractory AL Amyloidosis. This advancement marks a significant step in the field of rare diseases, with promising results indicating potential approval for this innovative treatment option. The application targets a specific patient population struggling with AL Amyloidosis, with a focus on those who have experienced relapse or are refractory to current treatments. The breakthrough could provide relief to approximately (insert number) individuals currently facing limited therapeutic options for this challenging condition.

data.title: GE Aerospace board declares $0.36 per share dividend for shareholders, payable on Oct 27, 2025.
data.description: In Cincinnati on September 18, 2025, the Board of Directors at GE Aerospace (NYSE: GE) announced a dividend of $0.36 per share for the Company's common stock. Shareholders of record as of the close of business on September will receive the dividend, which will be payable on October 27, 2025.
Nvidia CEO: Intel And Nvidia Have Collaborated For Nearly A Year

data.title: AI-powered sales tax platform Numeral secures $35M funding, processed $5B transaction volume, achieved 3.5x YoY revenue growth.
data.description: In San Francisco, Numeral, an AI-driven sales tax compliance platform, revealed a Series B funding round amounting to $35 million. The investment was spearheaded by Mayfield, alongside contributions from Benchmark, Uncork Capital, Y Combinator, and Mantis. The capital injection arrives after a year marked by significant expansion for Numeral, handling more than $5 billion in transaction volume, processing 150,000 sales tax returns, and attaining a notable 3.5x year-over-year revenue growth. The complexity and expense of sales tax compliance have emerged as critical challenges for businesses.

IDF: 'Initial report - The IDF has identified the launch of a missile from Yemen toward Israeli territory, aerial defense systems are operating to intercept the threat. The public is requested to follow the Home Front Command’s defensive guidelines.'

data.title: OrthoLite opens foaming plant in India to localize production, strengthening service for global partners.
data.description: In Amherst, Massachusetts, OrthoLite, a leading provider of sustainable footwear solutions, has announced the opening of their OrthoLite Foaming Plant in India. This move signifies a major advancement in OrthoLite's plan to streamline the entire product development process, enhancing their ability to serve regional and global brand partners. The facility, overseen by Country General Manager Vikash Bajargyan, is a crucial element in their strategy, demonstrating their commitment to localizing operations.
